content: Curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods (ICM/RND) and SOTA 2024-2025 active learning agent memory can be hybridized into a "memory-gated curiosity filter" that only encodes unexpected, high-intrinsic-reward experiences into long-term episodic memory, rather than storing all encountered state information. This design resolves the common problem of both domains: ICM/RND often wastes computation on noisy, uninformative novelties while large active memory systems suffer from catastrophic interference and storage bloat.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
